Sun.primary_signification: Soul, self, father, authority, government, vitality
Sun.current_sign_field: Wealth, food, stability, accumulated resources, beauty

Moon.primary_signification: Mother, mind, emotions, public, masses, travel
Moon.current_sign_field: Dharma, higher learning, fortune, philosophy, long travel

Mars.primary_signification: Siblings (younger), property, land, energy, courage, disputes
Mars.current_sign_field: Gains, networks, elder siblings, innovation, social causes

Jupiter.primary_signification: Wisdom, children, wealth, husband (female charts), teacher, dharma
Jupiter.current_sign_field: Communication, siblings, short journeys, intellect, trade

Venus.primary_signification: Wife/partner (male charts), vehicles, comforts, arts, relationships

Saturn.secondary_signification: Servants, iron, chronic illness, old age, death
Saturn.current_sign_field: Career, discipline, structure, public duty, ambition

Rahu.current_sign_field: Career, discipline, structure, public duty, ambition

Ketu.secondary_signification: Accidents, wounds, moksha, occult, hidden matters
Ketu.current_sign_field: Home, mother, emotions, water, comfort, nurturing

degree_flag_verdict.note: Sandhi — immature or unstable expression of themes.
Sandhi — immature or unstable expression of themes.
Mrityu Bhaga + retrograde — double suppression; weakened and non-linear.
